title: Round Pressure Plates
description: Makes all pressure plates round, including pressed ones.
body: ### DESCRIPTION Makes all pressure plates round, while still staying pixelated. Models were made using Blockbench. In spectator, the segments of the models will show. Models do not affect gameplay. ### VERSIONS Currently supports Minecraft **Java Edition 1.9 - 1.21.10**. Older versions will not accurately show the pack format due to it being a range in the file, however it should work fine. Fixing this would require uploading many unnecessary versions of the pack. ### COMPATIBILITY Incompatible with any resource pack editing the pressure plate block model. **Is compatible with modded pressure plates and custom textures referencing the vanilla model.** ### Patreon Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
